zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_fai: $self$在吸尘的时候不小心把某些重要的资料吸进去了！
$self$在整理桌子的时候不小心打翻了水杯！
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_suc: $self$看着整洁的房间，满意地点了点头。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_1: $self$爽快地答应道："没问题！正觉得有点无聊呢，一起弄吧！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_2: $self$挽起袖子，一副干劲十足的样子："包在我身上！我可是整理小能手。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_3: $self$咬着嘴唇，即便满脸写着抗拒，还是默默拿起了工具："知道了……我会做的……"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_4: $self$眼角带着泪光，颤抖着点了点头，不敢说出一个不字。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_5: $self$愣了一下，指着自己："诶？我也要来吗？好吧，既然你都这么说了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_6: $self$挠了挠头，似乎有些困惑："唔……虽然不擅长，但我会试试看的。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_7: $self$挽起袖子，从杂物间拿出了扫帚和簸箕："好，一口气把这里打扫干净吧。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_8: $self$看着有些凌乱的房间，无奈地叹了口气，开始动手整理桌上的文件。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Begin_9: $self$戴上围裙，眼神变得犀利起来："大扫除时间到！脏东西统统消失！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Tryjoin_1: $self$看着忙碌的$target$，凑上前问道："看起来挺辛苦的，我也来搭把手吧？"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Tryjoin_2: $self$有些手痒地拿起一块抹布："那个，我能一起帮忙吗？我有强迫症看着难受。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Joined_1: $self$开心地比了个OK的手势："好勒！那就比比谁弄得更干净！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Joined_2: $self$立刻投入了工作状态，动作麻利："多谢啦，两个人干果然快多了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_Refused_1: $self$有些失落地放下了手里的东西："好吧……那你自己加油。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_Refused_2: $self$耸了耸肩，转身离开："行行行，不打扰你的兴致了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_1: $self$擦了擦汗，笑着拒绝道："不用啦，这点小事我自己能搞定，你去休息吧。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_2: $self$挡在了$target$面前："这里灰尘大，你别弄脏了手，我一个人就行。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_3: $self$冷冷地说道："别来添乱，你在旁边只会碍手碍脚。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_4: $self$不耐烦地推开了$target$："走开走开，不需要你假惺惺的帮忙。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_5: $self$眼睛一亮，把扫帚递了过去："太好了！正愁一个人干不完呢，快来快来！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_6: $self$感激地看着$target$："真的吗？那是帮大忙了！那一块就拜托你了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_7: $self$身体僵硬了一下，默默地低头让开："……随你便吧。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_8: $self$不敢直视$target$的眼睛，只能唯唯诺诺地把工具递过去："是……请用……"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_9: $self$有些惊讶地眨了眨眼："诶？你要帮我吗？嗯……倒是不介意啦。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Join_10: $self$迟疑了一下，还是让出了一块位置："虽然没想到你会感兴趣……那就麻烦你了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Ongoing_1: $self$正哼着不知名的小调，用抹布仔细擦拭着窗台上的灰尘。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Ongoing_2: $self$全神贯注地分类着地上的垃圾，额头上渗出了一层细密的汗珠。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Ongoing_3: $self$手里拿着吸尘器在房间里来回走动，机器的轰鸣声掩盖了周围的动静。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_1: $self$听到脚步声，受惊般地缩紧了肩膀，握着扫帚的手指因为用力而发白。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_2: $self$下意识地退到了墙角，眼神闪烁不定，似乎随时准备逃跑。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_3: $self$低着头不敢看$target$，清理动作变得僵硬而机械："对、对不起……我马上就弄完……"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_4: $self$只是冷冷地瞥了$target$一眼，手中的动作反而更加用力，仿佛在发泄不满。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_5: $self$并没有理会$target$的出现，甚至故意背过身去继续拖地，把灰尘往那个方向扫。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_6: $self$皱起眉头，压低声音嘟囔了一句："啧，怎么偏偏这时候遇到不想见的人。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_7: 看到$target$进来，$self$停下手中的活，露出灿烂的笑容："哎呀，你来得正好，要不要一起喝杯茶休息下？"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_8: $self$擦了擦手，有些不好意思地笑了笑："抱歉让你看到这么乱的样子，马上就好。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_9: $self$对着$target$挥了挥手中的鸡毛掸子："嘿！小心灰尘哦，别弄脏了衣服。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_10: $self$特意挺直了腰背，借着擦高处的动作展示着自己的身体曲线，眼神悄悄飘向$target$。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_11: $self$脸颊微红，动作变得有些做作的轻柔："那个……你要是没事的话，可以多待一会儿也没关系……"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_12: $self$咬着嘴唇，故意把领口拉低了一些，用余光观察着$target$的反应。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_13: $self$礼貌性地点了点头，视线很快回到了手中的垃圾袋上："请让一下，正在打扫。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_14: $self$依然保持着原本的节奏，并没有因为$target$的出现而改变动作。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_15: $self$随口说了一句："小心地滑。"然后继续专注于拖地。
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_1: $self$抱歉地摆摆手："虽然很想帮忙，但我手上还有别的事走不开。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_2: $self$苦笑着指了指自己的衣服："下次吧，今天穿这身不太方便干活。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_3: $self$翻了个白眼，双手抱胸："哈？这种脏活为什么要我做？"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_4: $self$嫌弃地撇撇嘴："没空，你自己弄不就好了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_5: $self$看着焕然一新的房间，满意地叉着腰："哼哼，完美！简直像新房子一样！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_6: $self$擦掉汗水，回头对$target$露出灿烂的笑容："虽然很累，但看到这么干净还是很有成就感呢！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_7: $self$瘫坐在椅子上，一脸生无可恋："虽然弄干净了，但我的腰快断了……下次绝对不干了。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_8: $self$看着被洗得发白的手，心情有些低落："为了这点破事花了这么久，感觉真不值得。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_9: $self$看着依然有些乱的角落，却忍不住笑出了声："虽然没彻底弄完，但刚才那阵手忙脚乱还挺好玩的。"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_10: $self$无所谓地拍了拍手上的灰："尽力啦！反正比之前好多了，剩下的以后再说吧！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_11: $self$烦躁地把抹布摔在地上："啊啊啊！为什么越弄越乱啊！我不干了！"
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_12: $self$蹲在地上抱着膝盖，看着打翻的水桶，声音带着哭腔："搞砸了……明明想弄好的……"

en-us.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_fai: $self$ accidentally sucked up some important documents with the vacuum cleaner!
$self$ knocked over a glass of water while cleaning the desk!
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_suc: $self$ looked at the tidied up room and nodded in satisfaction.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_1: $self$ readily agreed: "No problem! I was getting bored anyway, let's do it together!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_2: $self$ rolled up her sleeves, looking full of energy: "Leave it to me! I'm a pro at tidying up."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_3: $self$ bit her lip, and despite the resistance written all over her face, silently picked up the tools: "Understood... I'll do it..."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_4: $self$ nodded tremblingly with tears in her eyes, daring not to refuse.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_5: $self$ paused and pointed at herself: "Eh? Me too? Well, if you say so."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_6: $self$ scratched her head, looking a bit confused: "Umm... I'm not good at this, but I'll give it a try."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_7: $self$ rolled up her sleeves and took a broom and dustpan from the utility room: "Alright, let's clean this place up in one go."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_8: $self$ looked at the slightly messy room, sighed helplessly, and started organizing the documents on the desk.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Begin_9: $self$ put on an apron, her gaze sharpening: "Cleaning time! Dirt, begone!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Tryjoin_1: $self$ looked at the busy $target$ and leaned in to ask: "That looks tough, need a hand?"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Tryjoin_2: $self$ picked up a rag, itching to help: "Um, can I help too? My OCD is kicking in watching this."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Joined_1: $self$ happily made an OK sign: "Alright! Let's see who can clean better!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Joined_2: $self$ immediately got to work, moving deftly: "Thanks, it's definitely faster with two people."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_Refused_1: $self$ put down the items in her hands, looking somewhat disappointed: "Okay... good luck on your own then."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_Refused_2: $self$ shrugged and turned to leave: "Fine, fine, I won't spoil your fun."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_1: $self$ wiped her sweat and smiled in refusal: "No need, I can handle this little thing myself, you go rest."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_2: $self$ blocked $target$'s way: "It's dusty here, don't get your hands dirty, I can do it alone."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_3: $self$ said coldly: "Don't make a mess, you'll just be in the way."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_4: $self$ impatiently pushed $target$ away: "Go away, I don't need your fake help."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_5: $self$'s eyes lit up as she handed over the broom: "Great! I was just worrying about doing it all alone, come on!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_6: $self$ looked at $target$ gratefully: "Really? That helps a lot! I'll leave that part to you."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_7: $self$ stiffened for a moment before silently stepping aside with her head down: "...Do as you please."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_8: $self$ dared not look $target$ in the eye, timidly handing over the tool: "Yes... please..."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_9: $self$ blinked in surprise: "Eh? You want to help me? Well... I don't mind."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Join_10: $self$ hesitated but made some room: "I didn't expect you to be interested... but thanks for the help."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Ongoing_1: $self$ was humming an unknown tune while carefully wiping the dust off the windowsill with a rag.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Ongoing_2: $self$ was fully focused on sorting the garbage on the floor, a fine layer of sweat forming on her forehead.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Ongoing_3: $self$ walked back and forth in the room with a vacuum cleaner, its roar drowning out surrounding noises.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_1: $self$ heard footsteps and shrank her shoulders in fright, her knuckles turning white from gripping the broom tightly.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_2: $self$ subconsciously retreated to the corner, her eyes darting around as if ready to flee.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_3: $self$ lowered her head, afraid to look at $target$, her cleaning movements becoming stiff and mechanical: "S-sorry... I'll finish right away..."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_4: $self$ just glanced coldly at $target$, scrubbing even harder as if venting her dissatisfaction.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_5: $self$ ignored $target$'s presence, even deliberately turning her back to continue mopping, sweeping dust in that direction.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_6: $self$ frowned and muttered under her breath: "Tsk, why run into someone I don't want to see now."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_7: Seeing $target$ enter, $self$ stopped working and smiled brightly: "Oh, perfect timing! Want to take a break and have some tea together?"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_8: $self$ wiped her hands and smiled sheepishly: "Sorry you have to see this mess, it'll be done soon."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_9: $self$ waved the feather duster at $target$: "Hey! Watch out for the dust, don't get your clothes dirty."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_10: $self$ deliberately straightened her back, showing off her curves while wiping high places, her eyes stealing glances at $target$.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_11: $self$ blushed slightly, her movements becoming affectively gentle: "Um... if you're free, you can stay a while longer, I don't mind..."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_12: $self$ bit her lip, intentionally pulling her collar lower while observing $target$'s reaction from the corner of her eye.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_13: $self$ nodded politely, her gaze quickly returning to the garbage bag in her hand: "Please excuse me, I'm cleaning."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_14: $self$ maintained her rhythm, not changing her movements despite $target$'s appearance.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_Interrupt_15: $self$ casually said: "Careful, wet floor," and continued to focus on mopping.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_1: $self$ waved her hand apologetically: "I'd love to help, but I have my hands full right now."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_2: $self$ smiled bitterly and pointed at her clothes: "Next time maybe, I'm not really dressed for work today."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_3: $self$ rolled her eyes and crossed her arms: "Hah? Why should I do such dirty work?"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_4: $self$ pouted in disgust: "No time, just do it yourself."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_5: $self$ looked at the refreshed room, hands on hips with satisfaction: "Heh, perfect! It's like a brand new house!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_6: $self$ wiped off her sweat and smiled brightly at $target$: "It was tiring, but seeing it so clean gives me a sense of accomplishment!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_7: $self$ slumped in the chair, looking lifeless: "It's clean now, but my back is breaking... never doing this again."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_8: $self$ looked at her hands, pale from washing, feeling a bit down: "Spent so much time on this crap, doesn't feel worth it."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_9: $self$ looked at the still somewhat messy corner but couldn't help laughing: "Didn't finish completely, but that flurry of activity was kinda fun."
en-us.com_job_cleaning_10: $self$ casually dusted off her hands: "I tried! Better than before anyway, let's leave the rest for later!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_11: $self$ threw the rag on the ground in frustration: "Argh! Why is it getting messier! I quit!"
en-us.com_job_cleaning_12: $self$ squatted on the ground hugging her knees, looking at the overturned bucket, her voice tearful: "Messed up... I really wanted to do it well..."
